creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've started the deprecation process for openjdk7 since it is no longer supported upstream, the FreeBSD port is many versions behind, and it is broken on 13.1 and higher.

I couldn't reproduce the build failure for openjdk8 on 13.1, although I didn't try the 2022Q2 branch.  The branch should now be 2022Q3 presumably, so I'd recommend trying that perhaps.  It looks a little like the build ran out of disk space.
